title: croptilon divaricatum var. graniticum
intro: Croptilon divaricatum var. graniticum, commonly known as a variety of the bushy or shrubby broom bush, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, with its roots and leaves exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits associated with Croptilon divaricatum var. graniticum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant's roots and leaves have been used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, which have been consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
